name: Summary of a categorical variable (n and %)
label: Categorical n (%)
description: n and percentage of a categorical analysis variable per group, with a referenced denominator analysis and a data-driven/pre-defined grouping branch. Verified against Common_Safety_Displays Mth01_CatVar_Summ_ByGrp; current cards API. Spurious by_vars/strata_vars params from the legacy sheet have been dropped (the template uses by_listc).
